nasb.text: For I am conscious of nothing against myself, yet I am not by this acquitted; but the one who examines me is the Lord.

esv.text: For I am not aware of anything against myself, but I am not thereby acquitted. It is the Lord who judges me.

cnv.text: 我雖然問心無愧，卻不能因此自以為義，因為判斷我的是主。

ccb.text: 就算我今日问心无愧，也不能自以为义，因为评价我的是主。

csbs.text: 我诚然问心无愧，但也并不因此被称为义，原来评断我的是主。
